title: Ars Sable
description: A compatibility mod for Ars Nouveau and Sable sublevels.
body:
This mod is currently a work in progress compat for Ars Nouveau and Sable/Aeronautics. 

Adds Sable compat to Ars Nouveau including:

- Allowing Starbuncles to path to blocks on sable sublevels
- Restoring the player back to the sublevel when entering and exiting a planarium
- Allowing source and relays to operate between sublevels and the real world
- Warp portals and scrolls will restore players onto the sublevel if bound to it.
- Rendering fixes for blocks, particles, and entities.
